name: Cleopatra VII
prompt:
Modern digital illustration portrait of Cleopatra VII for an MBTI-based personality platform.
Subject: Stylized portrait of Cleopatra VII, three-quarter view, looking at the viewer with a subtle smile. Historical garments simplified into clean blocks of color.
